recommendations.title: The Incredible Torture Show
recommendations.overview: Sardu, master of the Theatre of the Macabre, and his assistant Ralphus run a show in which, under the guise of 'magic', they torture and murder people in front of their audience. But what the punters see as a trick is actually real.

recommendations.title: The Warriors Gate
recommendations.overview: After a mysterious chest opens a gateway through time, teen gamer Jack is transported to an ancient empire terrorized by a cruel barbarian king. Jack will need all of his gaming skills as he battles to defeat the barbarian, protect a beautiful prince

recommendations.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups
recommendations.overview: When their latest scheme goes awry, Mayor Humdinger and his nephew Harold accidentally divert a meteor towards Adventure Bay. The meteor's golden energy grants the PAW Patrol superpowers. The heroic Mighty Pups are on a roll to super-save the day.

recommendations.title: Doraemon: Nobita's Great Adventure in the Antarctic Kachi Kochi
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Family, Science Fiction, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Doraemon and Nobita discover a mysterious golden ring far beneath the ice in Antarctica, leading them to uncover an ancient, ruined city.

recommendations.title: Delirious
recommendations.overview: A soap opera writer gets hit on the head and wakes up as a character in his own show.

recommendations.title: Nimona
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Action, Drama, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: The Golden Voyage of Sinbad
recommendations.overview: Sinbad and his crew intercept a homunculus carrying a golden tablet. Koura, the creator of the homunculus and practitioner of evil magic, wants the tablet back and pursues Sinbad. Meanwhile, Sinbad meets the Vizier who has another part of the interlo

recommendations.title: In a Heartbeat
recommendations.overview: A closeted boy runs the risk of being outed by his own heart after it pops out of his chest to chase down the boy of his dreams.

recommendations.title: Inhumans: The First Chapter
recommendations.overview: An isolated community of superhumans fight to protect themselves.

recommendations.title: Jules
recommendations.overview: A flying saucer lands in the backyard of an elderly suburbanite with memory problems, who forms a bond with the scared alien inside.
